title: gleichenia rigida
intro: Gleichenia rigida, also known as the Hard Tree Fern or Rigid Tree Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Gleicheniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of Gleichenia rigida are said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it can also be used as a topical application to soothe skin irritations.
